description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body, reinforced by four wide metal hoops that are bolted in place. The wood staves are dark brown with visible grain and texture, giving the barrel a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The barrel rests on two sturdy wooden supports, elevating it slightly off the ground. On one circular end, there is a metal spigot for dispensing liquid, and a white painted symbol resembling a fork and plate, suggesting it may be used for food or drink storage. The opposite end is plain, with no visible markings or openings. The metal bands and bolts add structural integrity and a slightly weathered, utilitarian look.
description: A rustic wooden barrel reinforced with metal hoops, featuring a spigot and a white painted symbol on one end. The barrel sits on wooden supports and has a weathered, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden barrel's metal hoops, spigot, and wooden supports.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the circular end with a white painted fork and plate symbol and the spigot protruding from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain wooden end of the barrel with metal hoops and no markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the white painted symbol visible, but no spigot in sight.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: white painted fork and plate symbol
